parameters.jsCode:
const c = $json;
const subjTpl = "You've been shortlisted — Scale Virtually __ROLE_LABEL__ assessment";
const bodyTpl = "Hi __FIRST_NAME__,

Congratulations! You've been shortlisted to move forward in the __ROLE_LABEL__ application process.

Next Step: Video Recording Assessment

This is a short recorded interview consisting of 7 questions and takes approximately 8-10 minutes to complete. No scheduling is required — you may complete it at any time before __DEADLINE__.

Start your assessment here:
__RECORDING_LINK__

What You'll Need
- A phone or desktop device with a working camera and microphone
- A quiet, well-lit environment
- Approximately 10 minutes of uninterrupted time

What to Expect
- A quick camera and microphone check before you begin
- One optional practice question to get comfortable
- 7 questions, 60-90 seconds each
- You can replay and re-record each answer before moving on

Why This Step Exists
We use a standardized video assessment to ensure a fair and consistent evaluation process for all candidates, especially given the high volume of applications.

If you experience any technical issues, simply reply to this email and our team will be happy to assist you. You can also request a retake directly from the assessment page.

Best regards,
The Scale Virtually Talent Acquisition Team";
const subst = (s) => s
  .replaceAll('__FIRST_NAME__', c.first_name || 'there')
  .replaceAll('__ROLE_LABEL__', c.role_label || 'Virtual Assistant')
  .replaceAll('__RECORDING_LINK__', c.recording_link || '(link unavailable)')
  .replaceAll('__DEADLINE__', c.deadline || '(deadline unavailable)');
return [{ json: {
  ...c,
  email_subject: subst(subjTpl),
  email_body: subst(bodyTpl),
  email_subject_json_str: JSON.stringify(subst(subjTpl)),
  email_body_json_str: JSON.stringify(subst(bodyTpl)),
} }];
